# 🎥 Fake Stream Simulator

A simple web app that simulates a live stream with:

* 📹 Camera integration
* 💬 Fake live chat
* ❤️ Reactions and viewer count

Perfect for demos, content creation, or UI experiments.

---

## 🚀 Live Demo

👉 https://yourusername.github.io/fake-stream/

---

## 📱 Features

* Uses your device camera (phone or desktop)
* Auto-generated fake comments
* Live viewer count simulation
* Reaction counters (❤️ 😂 😮)

---

## 🛠️ Built With

* HTML
* CSS
* JavaScript (Vanilla)
* Browser Media API (`getUserMedia`)

---

## ▶️ How to Use

1. Open the live demo link
2. Allow camera access
3. Start your “fake stream”

---

## ⚠️ Notes

* Works best on modern browsers (Chrome, Safari)
* Requires HTTPS for camera access (GitHub Pages supported)
* This is for **simulation/demo purposes only**

---

## 💡 Future Improvements

* Fake donations / alerts
* Sound effects
* Custom usernames
* TikTok-style UI
* Real chat via backend (Firebase, etc.)

---
